State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland. Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. item.title: 2014 Honda CTX 700
item.description:
Used 2014 Honda CTX700N motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 6,033 Miles. This pre-owned Honda CTX700N offers custom exhaust.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Displacement: 670 cc

item.title: 2014 Harley-Davidson® Electra Glide® Ultra Classic® FLHTCU
item.description:
Used 2014 Harley Davidson Electra Glide Ultra Classic motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 17,894 Miles. This pre-owned H.D. FLHTCU offers Screamin Eagle exhaust, chrome luggage rack, Harley navigation, custom grips, engine guards w/ highway pegs, smoked windscreen, chrome dash trim, LED headlight and driving lights, custom derby covers.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Displacement: 103.1 cu.in. (1,690 cc)
